heading: Today
text: Some periods of morning sun, mainly sunny east and south.  Mostly cloudy north and west, spreading east, with a few localized snow showers in the north and mountains.  Highs in the mid 20s to mid 30s west to east. Southwest winds, becoming west 10 to 25 mph, gusting 25 to 35 mph.

heading: St. Patrick’s Day
text: Some periods of morning sun, mainly sunny east and south.  Mostly cloudy north and west, spreading east, with a few localized snow showers in the north and mountains.  Highs in the mid 20s to mid 30s west to east. Southwest winds, becoming west 10 to 25 mph, gusting 25 to 35 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Any snow showers north ending, with gradual clearing.  Becoming mostly clear south.  Much colder.  Lows in the upper single numbers to low teens north, in the teens south.  Winds west to northwest 10 to 15 mph, gusting to 30 mph, diminishing to less than 10 mph.

heading: Wednesday
text: Sunshine, mixing with afternoon clouds.  Highs in the 20s to low 30s north, in the 30s south.  Winds light, becoming southwest near 10 mph.
